description_long: This is a rectangular wooden storage box with a dark, rich finish and visible grain patterns. The box features slatted panels on its longer sides, allowing for ventilation or partial visibility of the contents inside. The corners are reinforced with metal fasteners, adding both structural integrity and a subtle industrial aesthetic. The top surface is also slatted, matching the sides, and the ends of the box have vertical slats, suggesting a consistent design throughout. The overall construction appears sturdy, suitable for storing tools, supplies, or other items in an urban environment such as a garage or workshop. The box does not have visible handles, locks, or labeling areas, emphasizing a utilitarian and minimalist design.
description: A sturdy, dark wooden storage box with slatted sides and top, reinforced by metal fasteners. Its design is utilitarian and well-suited for urban storage needs.
description_view_0: End view showing vertical slats and metal corner fasteners, with the slatted top visible.
description_view_1: Long side view displaying horizontal slats, metal fasteners, and the full length of the box.
description_view_2: Opposite end view with vertical slats and a clear view of the slatted top.
description_view_3: Other long side view, similar to view 1, with horizontal slats and metal fasteners.
